title: Standard Shipping
text: Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days and is free on orders over $35. Orders under $35 have a flat $4.99 shipping fee. Orders placed before 12pm ET ship the same business day.

title: Expedited Shipping
text: Expedited shipping (2-3 business days) is available at checkout for $12.99. Overnight shipping is available in the continental US for $24.99 on orders placed before 2pm ET.

title: Return Window
text: Books may be returned within 30 days of delivery for a full refund, provided they are in resellable condition. Digital/e-book purchases are final sale and not eligible for return.

title: Refund Timing
text: Once a return is initiated, refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5-7 business days after Bookly receives the returned item. Store credit refunds, when chosen, post instantly.

title: High-Value Refund Review
text: Refunds of $1,000 or more are not processed automatically, even for an eligible, confirmed return. They are routed to a support specialist for manual review, who follows up within one business day. Smaller refunds are typically instant or processed within 5-7 business days.

title: Refunding to a Card
text: Before a refund is sent to your original payment method, Bookly support will confirm the last 4 digits of the card on file with you. If you'd rather skip that step, you can choose store credit instead, which posts instantly.

title: Password Reset
text: To reset your password, go to bookly.com/login and click 'Forgot password'. Enter the email on your account and we'll send a reset link that expires in 30 minutes. If you don't receive it, check spam or contact support to verify your account email.

title: Changing Account Email
text: You can update your account email from Account Settings > Profile. For security, changing your email requires re-verifying your password and confirming the new email address via a verification link.

title: Accepted Payment Methods
text: Bookly accepts Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, PayPal, and Bookly gift cards. We do not currently support Apple Pay or cryptocurrency.

title: Cancelling an Order
text: Orders can be cancelled for free within 1 hour of placing them, as long as they haven't entered processing. After that, the order cannot be cancelled but can be returned once delivered.

title: International Shipping
text: Bookly currently ships to the US, Canada, and the UK. International orders take 10-18 business days and customs fees, where applicable, are the responsibility of the customer.
